about_text1: Squadron is a member of the ASE Group with over a decade of experience in the unmanned aircraft industry. We focus on providing safe and comprehensive unmanned aviation products and services, safety consulting, and software.
about_text2: We owe our market position to our qualified staff, who combine their experience with innovative solutions. A team of certified pilots, instructors, and civilian-military experts guarantees the highest standards of service and training.
about_text3: Because we are the only company in Poland with the ISO - 28007 certificate, and our management has experience in implementing maritime security operations as part of NATO operations.
